faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our programs, enrollment process, and educational approach
faq.noResultsDesc: We couldn't find any questions matching your search.

enrollment.q1: How do I enroll my child in a program?
enrollment.a1: Enrollment is simple! Visit our enrollment page, select your desired program, fill out the registration form, and complete the payment process.
enrollment.a2: You will need to provide a copy of your child's recent report card, a completed registration form, and emergency contact information.

courses.a1: We offer both online and hybrid learning options. Our online classes feature interactive live sessions with small class sizes.
courses.a2: We maintain small class sizes with a maximum of 12 students to ensure personalized attention.

competitions.q1: What competitions do you prepare for?
competitions.a1: We prepare students for international competitions including CIMOC, PHIMO, AMC, and various national science olympiads.
competitions.a2: Yes, for qualified students selected through our process, we cover all competition registration fees.

pricing.a1: Yes, we offer flexible payment plans including monthly and semester options.
pricing.a2: We offer merit-based scholarships for exceptional students and need-based financial assistance.

general.q1: What age groups do you cater to?
general.a1: We offer programs for students from elementary school through high school (ages 6-18).
